Case Study • Various

How we helped Tairui’s E&#038;L Lighting’s Wisconsin, USA Site Earns EcoVadis Platinum Medal with Strategic ESG Advisory from Growlity

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

This achievement was made possible through the expert guidance and end-to-end ESG support provided by Growlity, Inc. USA, a global sustainability consulting firm.

A Milestone in Sustainable Manufacturing

The EcoVadis assessment, a leading global standard, evaluates companies across four sustainability pillars: Environment, Labor & Human Rights, Ethics, and Sustainable Procurement. Achieving the Platinum rating is a reflection of E&L Lighting’s robust sustainability practices and transparent reporting.

“Sustainability is not just a value at TAIRUI, it’s a responsibility we embrace across all operations. This EcoVadis Platinum Medal is a proud moment for E&L Lighting and a recognition of our efforts to build a future-ready and responsible global supply chain.”
Mr. Michael Lee,
Founder & CEO, Tairui Electronics Group

“This recognition affirms our strong ESG integration across operations. The EcoVadis Platinum rating reflects our commitment to global standards in environment, human rights, ethics, and sourcing. With Growlity’s support, we improved compliance, closed gaps, and showcased measurable, cross-border sustainability.”
Mr. John Fan, General Manager E&L Lighting

ESG Advisory that Delivers Results

Growlity provided tailored ESG advisory services including documentation readiness, sustainability policy enhancement, stakeholder engagement strategy, and EcoVadis submission management—leading to this exceptional outcome.

“We’re proud to support E&L Lighting in achieving the EcoVadis Platinum Medal. TAIRUI’s leadership and transparency made this journey impactful and aligned with global ESG expectations—setting a strong benchmark for the electronics sector.”
Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President & CEO,
Growlity, Inc. USA

“Collaborating with TAIRUI and E&L Lighting has been an inspiring experience. Their openness to change, data-driven improvements, and ESG focus helped us deliver a successful, top-tier EcoVadis outcome in record time.”
Mr. Prabhat Pant, Vice President, Global Business Development, Growlity, Inc. USA

About Tairui Electronics Group

Tairui Electronics Group has two R&D centers in Shenzhen, two national production bases (located in Shenzhen and Dongguan respectively), and overseas production bases in Mexico, the United States, and Malaysia. Its products are exported to more than 20 countries and regions worldwide, making it one of the representative enterprises of China’s “Intelligent Manufacturing” going global.

About E&L Lighting

E&L Lighting, based in Wisconsin, USA, is a prominent lighting solutions provider known for its high-quality, energy-efficient products. As a unit of Tairui Electronics Group, the company combines global innovation with local excellence.

About Growlity

Growlity is a globally trusted ESG and sustainability advisory firm operating in 25+ countries. Growlity supports organizations with solutions across EcoVadis, CDP, BRSR, CBAM, LCA, PCF, and other global sustainability frameworks. The firm’s mission is to drive measurable ESG impact, transparency, and competitive advantage for businesses worldwide
